title: laserpitium latifolium subsp. glabrum
intro: Laserpitium latifolium subsp. glabrum, also known as smooth meadow parsnip, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of Laserpitium latifolium subsp. glabrum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, menstrual cramps, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support overall digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried or infused to make teas, tinctures, or capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
